title: Status, Events, Logs, Metrics, Traces, Audit, and Layered Incident Response · Platform-System Defense
summary: A release review compares fresh status, events, logs, metrics, traces, audit, and layered incident response choices and accepts only answers tied to observable API, controller, workload, network, storage, or policy evidence. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for cluster and workload incident evidence record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Correlate spec, observedGeneration, conditions, reasons, messages, events, resource versions, controller ownership, and event retention without treating event order as durable history.
Collect current and previous container logs, multi-container streams, timestamps, kubelet and runtime logs, rotation, retention, and node-loss boundaries.
Distinguish resource metrics, component metrics, application metrics, state metrics, cardinality, scrape, storage, alert, and autoscaling evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# kubernetes-basics cumulative orchestration portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic manifest and evidence review only.
# They never invoke kubectl, read kubeconfig, contact a cluster API, or execute host commands.
workspace: kubernetes
version-baseline:
  kubernetes: 1.36.2
  minikube: 1.38.1
  gateway-api: 1.5.1
  helm: 4.2.2
transfer-boundary: authorized-disposable-cluster
evidence:

steps.title: K8s Status Conditions Events · changed case · Quiz K8s Status Conditions Events
steps.instruction:
quiz case — A quiz workload restarts after revision 2; logs rotated, metrics aggregate away one replica, events are delayed, and an operator deletes the Pod first. Preserve object status, events, current and previous logs, metrics, traces, node evidence, and a causal timeline.

Which action demonstrates K8s Status Conditions Events without dropping earlier contracts?
